scope.summary: Enable Codex runtime hooks and skills alongside the existing Kiro harness surface without changing application behavior.
goals: Keep Kiro as the primary runtime surface.
Enable Codex hooks, skills, and agents in .harness/config.json.
Materialize .codex/hooks.json and .agents/skills from the installed harness surface.
Verify Codex runtime surface and hook integrity with machine-readable checks.
Publish an HTML completion report for this harness feature.
nonGoals: Upgrading the full harness lockfile to a new major surface.
Weakening readiness, hook, evidence, or structural checks.

acceptance.description: agentRuntime.targets includes codex, while primary remains kiro.

verification.command: jq -e '.agentRuntime.primary == "kiro" and (.agentRuntime.targets | index("codex")) and .agentRuntime.codex.hooks and .agentRuntime.codex.skills and .agentRuntime.codex.agents' .harness/config.json

acceptance.description: .codex/hooks.json exists and registers the Codex hook events with AHK_RUNTIME=codex.
Codex runtime-surface and hook-integrity checks pass.
HTML completion report is written under .harness/reports/.
